description: Style Note This top from jealous 21 gives your wardrobe an immediate boost. The bright and trendy top flatters your figure and can be worn with a pair of shorts or jeans and heels. Product Details A solid magenta top with round neck, a buttoned detailing at the nape, bat wing short sleeves, sequined designs on the front yoke and ruched detailing on the shoulders and the side of the hem Material and Care 100% viscose Hand wash or machine wash using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
